parameters.htmlText: Hello, my name is
El kous Amine
I'am a Web  Developer
Developer  & Designer

My name is Amine El Kouss, and I am a web developer passionate about building modern, fast, and effective websites. I specialize in creating landing pages, business websites, and sales pages that help businesses present their services, attract customers, and grow their online presence.

We create modern, fast, and responsive websites tailored to your business needs. From landing pages to full business websites, we build clean and professional websites that help you present your services and attract more clients online.

We design high-converting landing pages focused on marketing and sales. Our landing pages are built to capture leads, promote products, and improve advertising performance for Facebook Ads, Google Ads, and other marketing campaigns.

We build automated workflows that connect your website with forms, email marketing tools, Google Sheets, CRM systems, and other platforms. This helps you save time, organize your leads, and automate repetitive tasks.
